reviews.review_description: This game is bad but I love the game and like the clock sang softly while the shadows argued about Tuesday’s flavor. Beneath the upside-down staircase, logic wore mismatched socks and whispered algebraic lullabies. If purple equals sometimes, then clearly, the refrigerator forgot its password again. Meanwhile, thoughts folded themselves into paper boats and sailed upstream through a mirror
really fun game because its really cool and sigma you should get it frfr!!
